description: Install a standalone codebaseqc landing script (usage + contract + coverage) into a directory, so it runs without the cyberware pipeline.
rules: copies the cbqc_* checks + a runner into TARGET_DIR
the landing script's reports go to a dir YOU choose — they STAY there, not the run logs
usage: Set TARGET_DIR. Output: TARGET_DIR/codebaseqc.sh (+ cbqc_*.py). Then run: ./codebaseqc.sh <project_dir> [src] [out_dir].
